channel.title: Alexandria - Kang Ifaz – Welcome to Alexa
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to Alexa on Alexandria - Kang Ifaz

item.description:
Ifaz Fachrul Hindami, S.T

Technical Director | IP & Network Solutions Expert

An accomplished Technical Director and Network Specialist with over five years of experience in the telecommunications industry. Proven expertise in IP network design, digital transformation, and team leadership. Certified Juniper Networks Certified Professional Service Provider (JNCIP-SP). Passionate about network architecture, automation, and data-driven decision-making.

📍 South Jakarta, Indonesia
📧 ifazfachrul@gmail.com
🌐 kangifaz.com
🔗 LinkedIn | GitHub
📞 +62 878-0406-0592

Work Experience

Technical Director - IP RAN & IP Leader, Regional Service Center

Huawei Tech Investment | Jakarta, Indonesia
05/2023 - Present

  • Led digitalization initiatives, reducing document creation time from 200 days to 10 days while improving accuracy by 95%.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders, including Project Management teams, customers, and resource pools, to achieve efficiency targets and streamline operations across projects.
  • Delivered and minimized technical risks across all projects, completing new integrations, router swaps, and system improvements for over 15,000+ devices with zero incidents or customer complaints.
  • Built and maintained strong relationships with clients, vendors, and senior management, increasing client satisfaction and fostering long-term partnerships.

IP Engineer

PT Elabram System | Jakarta, Indonesia
01/2020 - Present

  • Led a team in the successful migration of over 500 routers from Juniper to Huawei.
  • Prepared more than 5,000 BoQ, Design, Port Mapping, Low-Level Design (LLD), and Method of Procedure (MOP) for router swap implementations.
  • Integrated Network Cloud Engine IP (NCE-IP) for SDN Controller—the first deployment in Indonesia.

IP Transmission & Microwave Engineer

PT DGE | Jakarta, Indonesia
10/2018 - 12/2019

  • Designed and managed IP addressing and VLAN configuration for over 1,500 network elements.
  • Monitored and reported DB IP VLAN Design to stakeholders, including customers, engineers, and the PM team.
  • Conducted performance analysis of the IP transmission network, improving efficiency by 20% through optimized configurations and reduced downtime.

IP Backhaul Engineer

XL Axiata Tbk | Jakarta, Indonesia
12/2017 - 09/2018

  • Led migration planning for over 750 NE from TDM to IP networks, optimizing Abis Network.
  • Developed MOPs for seamless service migration, improving IP Backhaul network efficiency.
  • Completed planning and MOP for over 300 NE MBTS for mudik lebaran.

Education

Bachelor of Telecommunication Engineering

IT Telkom Purwokerto | Indonesia
09/2013 - 08/2017
GPA: 3.15 / 4.0

Certifications & Achievements

  • Huawei Future Star | Recognized for exceptional contributions to IP & RAN projects (10/2023)
  • Digitalization & Automation in Acceptance Process | Led implementation of an automated process (03/2023 - 06/2023)
  • Finished Delivery IPRAN NNI and IPBB Development in Q4 2024 (01/2025)

Technical Skills

  • Networking & Protocols: MPLS, OSPF, BGP, ISIS, EVPN, L2/L3 VPN
  • Cloud & DevOps: Cloud Computing, Linux System Administration, DevOps
  • Enterprise IT & Business: Database Management, Business Intelligence, Investment Analysis
  • Leadership & Strategy: Team Leadership, Project Management, Process Improvement

Interests

  • Digital Transformation & Automation
  • Data Science & Business Intelligence
  • Photography
  • Business Insight & Writing
